meaning: n.纯粹主义(指在语言,艺术等方面过于严格遵守传统规范),纯粹派(法国20世纪初的一个艺术流派)
examples: In accordance with this kind of purism came an emphasis on studying composers' manuscript notations, a relatively new field of musicology that is flourishing even today.
No amount of purism can really purify a man.
"Monument manifests purism in its design and realisation," said Miller.
Such churning limits doctrinal purism, which might otherwise be expected in a new church.
You have to admire that sort of purism and commitment to craft.
